stemHtml: Which of these statements is correct about a flight crew oxygen mask?

options.a: In the position “DILUTE” oxygen supply is from a special bottle containing diluted oxygen.
options.b: When selected to the position “EMERGENCY” oxygen is supplied with some overpressure above a certain altitude.
options.c: Most oxygen masks can be selected into three positions: NORMAL and/or DILUTE, 100% and EMERGENCY.
options.d: When switched to the position 100% oxygen is always supplied with some overpressure.
